calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-25-2019 Off Calendar

Motion Vacating Dismissal And Entering Judgment
Off Calendar Jul-16-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Counsel did not make an Appearance, just dropped off the proposed judgment. No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS BANK, FSB'S Motion for Order Vacating Dismissal And Entering Judgment against Defendant Pursuant to CCP section 664.6.

Plaintiff American Express Bank, FSB's motion to vacate dismissal and enter judgment is granted. No opposition filed. The dismissal entered on February 8, 2018 is vacated. The Bank is entitled to judgment in its favor and against defendant Pedro Rico in the amount of $19,194.58 plus costs per the memorandum of costs procedure.

Order and Judgment are signed. (see scanned order and judgment for details)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M.Goodman, Not Reported. =(302/HK)
